verbatim_text: And this is a lot of research that I started in 2019. So let's zoom into that. And I still like to use, you know, my favorite example that is, you know, Car 6 Plus. Let's say, you know, that in this list, right, there is a test problem, right? And, you know, Car 6 gives you his lecture notes. And this problem is solved once you understand the lecture notes. Because, you know, it's designed to be a good class. You can actually solve the problems. So this is really the simple say of test time training. And the core problem here is how to efficiently process a lot of relevant data and all the lecture notes, textbooks, given at test time. Now you might ask, what's the hard setting? The hard setting is, of course, that there's no relevant data at test time, right? No lecture notes, you know? And this can happen because Car 6 might not even know the answer, right?
